name: 13.5" Christmas Metal Wreath Hanger Black - Wondershop™
description:
Make your entryway nice and festive with this Metal Christmas Wreath Hanger from Wondershop™. This gorgeous wreath hanger is crafted from iron and finished in a black color. The over-the-door wreath hanger ensures an easy hanging solution without the need for nails or screws, making it ideal for displaying your favorite wreath throughout the Christmas season.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
